_doc: Add this to your Claude Desktop config file. Locations: macOS ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json | Linux ~/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json | Windows %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json. Restart Claude Desktop after saving. The HTTP transport is supported on Claude Desktop 0.9+ — for older versions, install `mcp-remote` via npm and replace the entry with a stdio-style command (see /examples/claude-code.mcp.json for that form).

emem.description: Earth memory protocol — recall, compare, find_similar, diff, trajectory, verify over signed receipts.
